response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — directly relevant to the role. His background spans high-scale systems (Sociomantic), fintech (RIDE), and platform work, with demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing). Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, but his polyglot history and architecture experience suggest he can ramp quickly.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with recent AI-agent and MCP work
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Polyglot engineer comfortable across languages, with architecture and scaling experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work — Java appears mainly in older roles
Cloud experience leans AWS; no mention of Vitest specifically or Kubernetes depth
